steps.title: Show population and density
steps.content: The student wants to show that a country with a very large population can have lower population density than a country with a much smaller population. The example must compare both population and density data for two countries.

steps.title: Pick the contrasting data
steps.content: A says Zambia and Benin have similar densities, so it does not show the contrast. B gives only Mali's size and population. D compares populations across years, not density. The Mali-Lesotho comparison directly pairs high population with low density and lower population with higher density. The answer is C.
